Package com.iwedia.dtv.io

Enum Class DeviceType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<DeviceType>
com.iwedia.dtv.io.DeviceType
All Implemented Interfaces:
android.os.Parcelable, Serializable, Comparable<DeviceType>, Constable
public enum DeviceType extends Enum<DeviceType> implements android.os.Parcelable
Type for the given component: DEVICE_TYPE_HDMI DEVICE_TYPE_DVI DEVICE_TYPE_SCART DEVICE_TYPE_CVBS DEVICE_TYPE_RGB DEVICE_TYPE_VGA DEVICE_TYPE_SVIDEO DEVICE_TYPE_RF DEVICE_TYPE_USB DEVICE_TYPE_COMPONENT DEVICE_TYPE_SPDIF DEVICE_TYPE_SPEAKER DEVICE_TYPE_HEADPHONE DEVICE_TYPE_DIGITAL_TUNER DEVICE_TYPE_PANEL DEVICE_TYPE_ANALOG_TUNER
